seoTitle: Lyons vs Macarthur — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Lyons and Macarthur. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Lyons and Macarthur.
heading: Lyons vs Macarthur — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Lyons, Australian Capital Territory and Macarthur, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Lyons has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Macarthur (42/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Lyons or Macarthur safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Lyons has a flood risk score of 44/100, while Macarthur scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Lyons scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Macarthur scores 62/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Lyons or Macarthur?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Lyons has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.78% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
